reg_text:
PRICING POLICY (excerpt). Read every numbered item and identify which are hard pricing constraints:

1. The pricing committee meets on the first business day of each quarter to review exceptions.
2. Internal control requires a minimum gross margin: price at least procurement cost (4) plus 7.
3. Late filing is deemed an automatic withdrawal of the price application.
4. The product catalog version code is RX-2026-Q2; cross-reference indices are maintained on a quarterly basis.
5. All monetary figures in this document are denominated in CNY and rounded to two decimal places.
6. The listed price of a non-selected product shall not exceed 1.5 times the winning-bid price (10).
